overall.description: Nighttime gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style open world game, showing a character walking through a wet city street intersection. The scene features artificial street lighting reflecting off damp asphalt, rocky hillsides with elevated walkways, and futuristic urban architecture under a dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner with crosswalk and hillside backdrop

events.description: begins walking forward from the sidewalk toward the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk approaching the intersection crosswalk, observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket standing at the corner near the crosswalk

entered.detail: steep rocky terrain with sparse vegetation covering the hillside
metal pedestrian bridge with railings ascending diagonally up the hillside
large suspended advertising platform with multiple rectangular screen panels
tall pole with bright overhead lamp illuminating the intersection
zebra crossing stripes painted on the asphalt road surface
red octagonal traffic sign mounted on pole at street corner

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet city street corner at night, with the camera positioned on a concrete sidewalk. A pedestrian in a yellow jacket stands near a crosswalk waiting, while street lamps cast orange light onto the damp pavement. In the background, a rocky hillside features an elevated walkway, and a large floating billboard structure hovers on the left side of the frame.

events.description: turns right and steps off the curb to cross the street
green sports car drives through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane road while turning right toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: green sports car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: small single-story building with green facade and illuminated entrance
large illuminated corporate lettering on the rocky hillside

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right and crosses the wet asphalt intersection, leaving the pedestrian behind. A green sports car passes through the intersection as the camera moves toward the opposite sidewalk. A small green building becomes visible on the right, and large illuminated signage appears on the distant hillside while the floating billboard exits the frame to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a static city street corner across a rain-slicked intersection toward a distant urban hillside. It begins on a concrete sidewalk where a pedestrian in a yellow jacket waits under the orange glow of street lamps, with a floating billboard hovering to the left and a rocky hillside in the background. As the camera turns right and glides across the wet asphalt, the pedestrian and the billboard fade from view while a green sports car streaks through the intersection. The scene then opens up to reveal a small green building on the right as the camera approaches the opposite sidewalk. Finally, the perspective shifts toward the horizon, where large illuminated signage glows against the dark hillside.
